UserDashboardPreferences.title: User Dashboard Preferences
UserDashboardPreferences.description: Customizable weather dashboard configuration, saved cities list, and metrics preference settings for authenticated users.

savedCities.description: Custom ordered index of saved locations to render on multi-city dashboard card panels

unitSystem.description: Temperature and velocity unit preference metric system

gridConfig.description: Card toggles representing customizable meteorological metrics visibility

/users/{userId}.description: Individual workspace containing metric parameters and saved list of forecasting locations for a signed-in user.
